title: Klaara - Healthcare Booking and Patient Communication
problem: Healthcare booking systems are fragmented. Patients cannot easily find and book appointments across providers.
solution: Healthcare marketplace enabling patients to search, compare, and book appointments with healthcare providers.
technology: Booking platform, provider directory, patient app
varden_fit: High — Finnish equivalent to Varden's marketplace model. Cross-border opportunity?
notes: Finnish healthcare marketplace. Potential expansion target.
